subject: राजस्थान
question_en: Which language is more widely spoken in Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Hindi is the most widely spoken language in Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: राजस्थान में सबसे पसंदिता भाषा हिंदी है।

subject: राजस्थान
question_en: What is the royal symbol of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: The royal family of Rajasthan is known as the Maharajas. Rajasthan is a historic state in India with a rich cultural heritage. The royal family of Rajasthan played a significant role in the development of the state's culture.

subject: राजस्थान
question_en: Who is the founder of Jaisalmer?
question_hi: जासालमेर की संघ कौन सी संतुलीया
explanation_en: Rao Jodha is considered as the founder of Jaisalmer, a city in Rajasthan, India. He was a Rajput chieftain who established the city in 1156 AD.
explanation_hi: राजमेर के संतुलीया मैंने 1156 AD के समयांकर इमान ने उन्ने खचलमेर का संतुलीया

subject: राजनिया
question_en: Who is the present ruler of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: C. Rajeshwar Singh is the current ruler of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: चेन राजा राजा इन इमान सजन का सार्न इमान

subject: राजन
question_en: Which district is the capital of Jaisalmer?
explanation_en: Barmer is the capital district of Jaisalmer.
explanation_hi: जायान का इमान जान का इमान
